meaning: n.e.s.not elsewhere specified 不另说明,别处不作说明
examples: Q. How did the NES meet or exceed your expectations?
By 1990, one-third of all US homes had an NES system.
There are a lot of sensational nes stories in today's newspaper.
Because of my husband, we have four NES systems, a Wii, and a Playstation 3.
The RetroN 4 plays NES, SNES, Genesis and GBA cartridges all in one convenient console.
